MODULE ONE – Introduction to Module One

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Executive Summary:
• 	Finding out what people want and giving it to them is a core strategy that has gotten me
to where I am today.
• 	This module is about building the core pieces that are going to fit into all the other
modules as you go forward.
• 	Don’t try to reverse engineer this stuff and expect to achieve the same results I have.
• 	PLF is about how to launch products, businesses, brands – but it’s also how to build
yourself a business and a brand.
• 	Here’s the key as you go through this course: don’t feel like you have to keep up with every
single video.
• 	“Be gentle with yourself” - almost no one gets through everything on time, so don’t lose
momentum or feel bad if you fall behind
• 	You’ll also be exposed to some core personal development concepts. There is some inner
work required in order to truly build a successful business.
• 	I’m glad you’re in the community and I want you to jump in – ask questions, post
comments, pat people on the back – get started now.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

TRANSCRIPT:
Okay! Welcome to Module 1! I’m excited for you and to have you as part of
our community.
This module is all about the core strategies and tactics and if you only go
through this module, if you only go through module 1, you’re going to
learn how to build a relationship, how to have a conversation with your
prospects, your clients, your customers, and that will make all the
difference in your business - all the difference in your marketing.
Now, I don’t want you to stop and just go through module 1, but just this
module 1 will be a game changer. It’s going to change the way you approach your
business. This is about the conversation that will tie your marketing to your products
and your offer. It will allow you to build better products and better offers. That’s how
I built Product Launch Formula®.
This is a great, great course and the only reason that it’s a great course is
because every step of the way I am having a conversation with my PLF Owners so
just this module is going to change everything for you. It’s the core work. It’s going
to impact all of your launches and all of your marketing.
If you’re just starting out or whether you already have a business or you’re
some type of practitioner like a health practitioner or a legal practitioner or a
business practitioner, any one of those - if you’re an artist, no matter what… finding
out what people want and giving it to them, that’s one of my core strategies. It’s really
got me to where I am.
This module is about building the core pieces that are going to fit into all the
other modules as you go forward.
So, you’re now part of the PLF family. I’m just excited.
If you’re brand-new, there are some people that have been with me since
2005 and upgraded to every single one. But if you’re brand-new, this is going be very
awesome.
If you’re upgrading, what you’re going to find is the stuff in module 1 - a lot of
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

it we’ve covered before but some of it’s new and it’s all better - it’s all done in a better
way. You should go through this module but be gentle on yourself - you don’t need
to be perfect. Don’t beat yourself up by not going through every video immediately.
In fact, if you need to, skip around. If you have to take a break, that’s fine - just
circle back because this is really important core stuff.
Don’t think because you registered for Product Launch Formula and went
through my launch, you can just watch what I did in my launch and just reverse
engineer it and do what I did.
There’s some core stuff in PLF. Like figuring out your avatar and what makes
them tick. You’ll learn those kind of things here in module 1 and they’re huge - you
can’t reverse engineer your way into those.
So, PLF is all about how to launch products, businesses, brands. It’s also how
to build yourself a business and a brand. It’s how I built my business and brand - I’m
a product of my own teaching. I built this brand, this Product Launch Formula brand
since 2005 and that’s what I want to teach you. I want to teach you how to build a
serious business, a serious brand that’s going to be around for a long time.
There’s also going to be some inner game stuff in here. I used to hesitate
talking about that, but the thing is we all need to continually up our game and that’s
just the deal.
I used to really hesitate teaching people about it, thinking who am I to tell
people how to live or whatever. But the reality is I’ve done okay. I’ve filled a pretty
big life here and I want to make a big impact on you, so there’s going to be some
inner game stuff.
Just being here is a massive change for you. The minute you hit that button
and registered, that’s when the change happened and that’s when you started to step
up into this big game.
So, jump into the community. Ask questions. Post comments. Pat people on
the back - that’s how you build community. A great question can foster community.
Make a comment on a video or just give somebody an, “atta boy”.
So dig into the portal and start thinking about PLF Live already. Bring your
biggest self here because when you’re in the community, when you’re in there
interacting, just be cool and bring your biggest, best self.
